task_completion.description: Change the viewport camera to the Top view.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP viewport displays the aircraft model from above (wings spread horizontally, nose pointing up or down). The View menu or camera controls may indicate 'Top' is selected.

task_completion.description: Export the Top view drawing as an SVG to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file save or export dialog is visible showing the filename 'eCRM001_top.svg' being saved in the directory '/home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/exports/'.

task_completion.description: Change the viewport camera to the Front view.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP viewport displays the aircraft model from the front (nose pointing towards the camera, wings extending to the sides, vertical tail visible).

task_completion.description: Export the Front view drawing as an SVG to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file save or export dialog is visible showing the filename 'eCRM001_front.svg' being saved in the directory '/home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/exports/'.

task_completion.description: Change the viewport camera to the Side view (Left or Right).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP viewport displays the aircraft model from the side (nose pointing left or right, vertical tail visible, wings seen edge-on).

task_completion.description: Export the Side view drawing as an SVG to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file save or export dialog is visible showing the filename 'eCRM001_side.svg' being saved in the directory '/home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/exports/'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the OpenVSP GUI to change views and export files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through OpenVSP menus (e.g., View, File > Export) rather than using terminal commands to generate or mock the files.

integrity.description: The agent actually changed the camera perspective for each export.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 3D viewport in OpenVSP must visibly change to show the Top, Front, and Side perspectives before each respective export action, proving the agent didn't just save the same view three times.

integrity.description: The agent used the genuine export functionality of OpenVSP.
integrity.visual_evidence: The save dialogs should be triggered from OpenVSP's export feature, not by renaming existing files in a file manager or creating empty files in a text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Expected SVG export paths:
1. /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/exports/eCRM001_top.svg
2. /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/exports/eCRM001_front.svg
3. /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/exports/eCRM001_side.svg
The model used is the NASA eCRM-001 conceptual aircraft. Ensure the agent actually changes the camera view in OpenVSP before exporting each file.
